reasoning: Based on recent news and pricing data, BNB is trading around $900 as of November 20-23, 2025. It had previously reached highs well below $1,600 (some sources say $1,111 or $1,350 as all-time highs). There are absolutely no reports of a flash spike to $1,600 on the Binance BNB/USDT 1-minute chart during November. For the market to resolve to YES, BNB would either need to have had an unreported "fat finger" wick to $1600 or rally ~75% from its current price in the remaining 7 days of the month. Both scenarios are extremely unlikely for an asset of BNB's massive market capitalization. The Polymarket price 10 days ago (Nov 13) was already at the floor of 2%, reflecting this steep unlikelihood. Therefore, I assign the minimum allowable probability of 0.02.
